markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire early if the event occurs.
markets.rules_primary: If Orkun Kokcu records at least 1 goal during the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Turkiye vs Paraguay professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jun 19, 2026, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to a player in the entire game (regulation, stoppage and any extra time periods) of the Turkiye vs Paraguay professional FIFA World Cup soccer game originally scheduled for Jun 19, 2026. If a player is active but never enters the game, the market settles to the last fair market price before game start. Once a player enters the game, the market settles based on the player's goals scored.
markets.title: Orkun Kokcu: 1+ goals

markets.rules_primary: If the temperature recorded at Central Park, New York City for Jun 20, 2026 3 AM EDT as reported by The Weather Company (for coordinates KNYC), is above 78.99°, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary:
The official, final value for this market is the temperature reported by the The Weather Company, not any other weather service.
NWS Climatological Reports, Google Weather, etc. may be useful references, but are not authoritative for resolution.
Preliminary Weather Company data may be subject to rounding and conversion differences from the final reported value.
Use caution when interpreting preliminary Weather Company readings.
markets.subtitle: -1° or below
markets.title: Will the temp in New York City be above 78.99° on Jun 20, 2026 at 3am EDT?

markets.early_close_condition: This market will close and expire after a winner is declared.
markets.rules_primary: If Alex Prifti wins the Bartoletti vs Prifti professional tennis match in the 2026 Davis Cup 2026 Group IV Europe Round after a ball has been played, then the market resolves to Yes.
markets.rules_secondary: The following market refers to the Bartoletti vs Prifti professional tennis match in the 2026 Davis Cup 2026 Group IV Europe Round after a ball has been played. If the match does not occur (signaled by a ball being played) due to a player injury, walkover, forfeiture, or any other cancellation (all before the match starts), all markets will resolve to $0.50. If a player withdraws or forfeits after a match has started, that player will resolve to No. If this match is postponed or delayed, the market will remain open and close after the rescheduled match has finished (within two weeks).
markets.title: Will Alex Prifti win the Bartoletti vs Prifti: Davis Cup 2026 Group IV Europe Round match?
